availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: There are two versions of the Lord's Prayer in Romanized Lushootseed.

listWit.witness: Lushootseed Dictionary, Bates, Hess and Hilbert (1994)

app.rdg: The Lord prayer.
OUR FATHER.
g史蓹涩 dib蓹涩 bad
g史蓹涩 dib蓹涩 bad
Notre P猫re
The Lord's Prayer

Gwalhof, belonging.to" Deb膬lh1p.pl.emphatic.pronoun Banfather, degwe2p.sg.emphatic.pronoun 怒膩be.there, be.in.existenceWhat's the 怒 here? Perhaps for the glottal onset (uncharacteristically). Wouldn't be the second 蕯u entry in BHH, would it? (exclamatory interjection of pleasure or hesitation)??? 膬lon.along.in.through.at.when kw膿a.any(hypothetical,doubtful) Sh膬khhigh,up.in.the.air Chirouse does not include the 'r' he almost always puts in this word.! Note capitalization: probably influenced from the prayer's title "Pater Noster" or "Notre P猫re" or "Our Father".
Gwalh debalh Ban dgwe a al kwi sherk, Note capitalization: used in this ms. for sentence-initial words and names of diety.
g史蓹涩 dib蓹涩 bad d蓹g史i 蕯a蕯 蕯al k史i s虒蓹q,
(not in BHH)
Notre P猫re qui 锚tes aux cieux ;
g史蓹涩 dib蓹涩 bad d蓹g史i 蕯a 蕯al k史i s虒蓹q,

膫lhgood.nice.pretty.beautiful kwe a.any(hypothetical,doubtful) gwassubjunctive-stative oyotomsh-make-tr-pass-3S lilzirhwalhby.what.route,located.where,by.what.means + first,before_(in.time/space)+good.nice.pretty.beautiful tadsgwanon-contrastive.demonstrative+2p.sg.possessive+nominalizer+one's.own atsda!
halh kwi gwas hoyotobs lilhzihu alh ta adsgwa atsda.
ha蕯涩 k史i g史蓹shuyut蓹bs li涩胜ix史 ha蕯涩 t(i) adsg史a蕯 蕯蓹 t蓹 sda蕯.
ha蕯涩 k史i g史蓹shuyut蓹bs li涩胜ix史 ha蕯涩 ti adsg史a 蕯蓹 t蓹 sda蕯.
Que votre nom soit sanctifi茅 ;
ha蕯涩 k史i g史蓹shuyut蓹bs li涩胜ix史 ha蕯涩 t(i) adsg史a蕯 蕯蓹 t蓹 sda蕯!
Degwe gwa Serh-Siamchelh;
dgwe gwa sihusiamchelh,
d蓹g史i g史蓹six史si蕯ab c虒蓹涩,
(not in BHH)
Que votre r猫gne arrive ;
d蓹g史i g史蓹six史si蕯ab c虒蓹涩,
膫lh kwe gwa ch膩l膬 tadsgw膬 adshelrachem, alte swatirten
halh kwi gwas chalatobs ta adsgwa adschelhrachem alti swatihuhted,
ha蕯涩 k史i g史蓹sc虒alat蓹bs t(i) adsg史a蕯 adsc虒蓹涩x虒蓹c虒蓹b 蕯al ti swatix史t蓹d,
ha蕯涩 k史i g史蓹sc虒alat蓹bs t(i) adsg史a蕯 ad(s)s虒蓹涩x虒蓹c虒蓹b 蕯al ti swatix史t蓹d
Que votre volont茅 soit faite sur la terre
ha蕯涩 k史i g史蓹c虒ala t(i) adsg史a蕯 adsc虒蓹涩x虒蓹c虒蓹b 蕯al t蓹 swatix史t蓹d,
Rh艒l膬b膬 kw' 艒-cha-l膬 tadsgwa adchel-rha-chem al de Sherk.
rolab a tu chalad ta adsgwa adschelhrachem aldi sherk.
x虒史ul始ab 蕯蓹 t蓹 c虒alad t(i) adsg史a蕯 adsc虒蓹涩x虒蓹c虒蓹b 蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q.
x虒史ul始ab 蕯蓹 t蓹s(u)c虒alad t(i) adsg史a蕯 ad(s)s虒蓹涩x虒蓹c虒蓹b 蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q.
comme au ciel.
x虒史ul始蓹b 蕯蓹 k史(i蕯)uc虒ala t(i) adsg史a蕯 ad(s)s虒蓹涩x虒蓹c虒蓹b 蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q.
T膿膿lh sallhen chelh al mek slarh臎lh, 沫膩mli膿t艒b艔lh 膩lt墨 slar(?).
Tihilh sattledcbelh al ku boku slar锚l adsabietobolh alti slar锚l
ti蕯i涩 s蕯蓹涩蓹dc虒蓹涩 蕯al k史i b蓹k始史 sl蓹x虒il ads蕯abyitubu涩 蕯al ti sl蓹x虒il.
(not in BHH)
Donnez-nous aujourd'hui notre pain quotidien (or : de chaque jour).
ti蕯i涩 s蕯蓹涩蓹dc虒蓹涩 蕯al b蓹k始史 sl蓹x虒il 蕯abyitubu涩 蕯al ti sl蓹x虒il.
Klob-chorh 菕rh怒b沫etobolh, uk-to skwadadchelh,
'tlob chahu obalitsietobolh a tu tskwadadchelh,
茮'ub c虒蓹x史 蕯ubalicyitubu涩 蕯蓹 t蓹 胜蓹k始史adadc蓹涩,
茮'ub c虒蓹x史 蕯ubaliicyitubu涩 蕯蓹 t蓹 胜蓹k始史adadc蓹涩
(Et) pardonnez-nous nos offenses,
茮'ub c虒蓹x史 蕯ux史蓹byitubu涩 蕯蓹 k史i 胜蓹k始史adadc蓹涩,
rh艒l膬b膬 kw' orh怒b沫ech臎lh 膬 t膬 l膬l臎 assilhtamerh atodskwadad twal debalh.
rolab a tas balitsiedchelh ta lale atsilhtalbihu a tu tskwadads dhual debalh,
x虒史ul始ab 蕯蓹 t蓹 baliicyidc虒蓹涩 t蓹 l蓹li蕯 蕯aci涩talbix史 蕯蓹 ti 胜蓹k始史adads dx史蕯al dib蓹涩,
x虒史ul始ab 蕯蓹 t蓹 sbaliicyid c虒蓹涩 t蓹 l蓹li蕯 蕯aci涩talbix史 蕯蓹 t蓹 胜蓹 k始史adads dx史蕯al dib蓹涩
comme nous pardonnons 脿 ceux qui nous ont offens茅s.
x虒史ul始蓹b 蕯蓹 k史i 蕯ux史蓹byitubu涩 蕯蓹 t蓹 l蓹li蕯 蕯aci涩talbix史 蕯蓹 t蓹 胜蓹k始史adad dx史蕯al dib蓹涩.
Klob chor otsellalektoboh twalh gwalh mok skwadad schassand,
'tlob chahu otslalikutobolh dhual gwalh boku tskwadad schiss芒d,
茮'ub c虒蓹x史 蕯uc虝蓹lalik史tubu涩 dx史蕯al g史蓹涩 b蓹k始史 胜蓹k始史adad sc虒蓹sad,
茮'ub c虒蓹x史 蕯uc虝蓹lalik史tubu涩 dx史蕯al g史蓹涩 b蓹k始史 胜蓹k始史ad蓹d c虒蓹涩
(Et) ne nous laissez pas succomber 脿 la tentation.
茮'ub c虒蓹x史 蕯uc虝蓹lalik史tubu涩 dx史蕯al g史蓹涩 b蓹k始史 胜蓹k始史adad sc虒蓹sad,
gulo klob chorh 艔l膿lto-bolh tolak mok sa!
hoi chahu a tleltobolh tolal ku boku sa.
huy c虒蓹x史a 涩iltubu涩 tul始蕯al k史i b蓹k始史 sa蕯.
(not in BHH)
Mais d茅livrez-nous du mal.
g史蓹l 茮'ub c虒蓹x史 蕯uliltubu涩 tul始蕯al k史i b蓹k始史 sa蕯!
Klob 膩ss墨st膬!
'Tlob asista.
茮'ub 蕯蓹s蕯ist蓹蕯.
茮'ub 蕯蓹s蕯ist蓹蕯.
Ainsi soit-il.
茮'ub 蕯蓹s蕯ist蓹蕯.
